azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppExceptions
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| extend AppRoleName = iff(isempty(AppRoleName), "Client", AppRoleName)
| where $__contains(AppRoleName, $Apps)
| extend IsLowSeverity = (
    tostring(Properties["TransientException"]) == "True" or 
    tostring(Properties["KnownException"]) == "True" or 
    toint(SeverityLevel) < 3
)
| summarize 
    LowSeverityCount = countif(IsLowSeverity == true),
    HighSeverityCount = countif(IsLowSeverity == false)
    by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval), AppRoleName
| order by TimeGenerated asc

AppRequests
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| extend AppRoleName = iff(isempty(AppRoleName), "Client", AppRoleName)
| where $__contains(AppRoleName, $Apps)
| summarize
    ['Success'] = countif(Success == true),
    ['Warning'] = countif(Success == false and (Properties["HasTransientException"] == "true" or Properties["HasKnownException"] == "true")),
    ['Error'] = countif(Success == false and (Properties["HasTransientException"] != "true" and Properties["HasKnownException"] != "true"))
    by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval), AppRoleName
| order by TimeGenerated asc

spec.title: Ongoing AI Conversations
spec.description: Number of active SignalR chatbot streams (`appHub.ongoing_conversations_count` UpDownCounter from customMetrics). Tracks concurrent AI workloads in the AppHub.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == "appHub.ongoing_conversations_count"
| extend AppRoleName = iff(isempty(AppRoleName), "Client", AppRoleName)
| where $__contains(AppRoleName, $Apps)
| summarize ConversationCount = avg(Sum) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval), AppRoleName
| order by TimeGenerated asc

spec.title: Attachment Resize P95
spec.description: P95 duration of image resize operations (`attachment.resize_duration` histogram from customMetrics). Values are in milliseconds.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == "attachment.resize_duration"
| extend AppRoleName = iff(isempty(AppRoleName), "Client", AppRoleName)
| where $__contains(AppRoleName, $Apps)
| summarize P95_ms = percentile(Sum, 95) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval), AppRoleName
| order by TimeGenerated asc

spec.title: Application Throughput (RPS)
spec.description: Monitors the application's traffic load by displaying the dynamic Requests Per Second (RPS) over the selected time range to identify traffic trends and spikes.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppRequests
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| extend AppRoleName = iff(isempty(AppRoleName), "Client", AppRoleName)
| where $__contains(AppRoleName, $Apps)
| summarize RequestsCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval), AppRoleName
| extend RPS = RequestsCount / (totimespan($__interval) / 1s)
| project TimeGenerated, RPS, AppRoleName
| order by TimeGenerated asc

spec.title: Memory Working Set
spec.description: `dotnet.process.memory.working_set` - physical memory currently used by the process (from customMetrics).

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppMetrics
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name == "dotnet.process.memory.working_set"
| extend AppRoleName = iff(isempty(AppRoleName), "Client", AppRoleName)
| where $__contains(AppRoleName, $Apps)
| summarize WorkingSet = max(Sum) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval), AppRoleName
| order by TimeGenerated asc

AppRequests
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name != "GET /app-hub"
| where tostring(Properties["rpc.system"]) != "signalr"
| extend AppRoleName = iff(isempty(AppRoleName), "Client", AppRoleName)
| where $__contains(AppRoleName, $Apps)
| summarize 
    AvgDurationMs = avg(DurationMs),
    MaxDurationMs = max(DurationMs),
    RequestCount = count(),
    SampleUrl = any(Url)
    by RequestName = Name, AppRoleName
| top 100 by AvgDurationMs desc
| project RequestName, AppRoleName, AvgDurationMs, MaxDurationMs, RequestCount, SampleUrl

AppExceptions
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| extend AppRoleName = iff(isempty(AppRoleName), "Client", AppRoleName)
| where $__contains(AppRoleName, $Apps)
| summarize 
    // Get the first occurrence of these properties for each unique error group
    // Note: If ExceptionMessage is still empty, try replacing it with OuterMessage
    ErrorMessage = any(OuterMessage), 
    IsKnown = any(tostring(Properties["KnownException"])),
    IsTransient = any(tostring(Properties["TransientException"])),
    Severity = case(
        any(SeverityLevel) == 0, "Verbose",
        any(SeverityLevel) == 1, "Information",
        any(SeverityLevel) == 2, "Warning",
        any(SeverityLevel) == 3, "Error",
        any(SeverityLevel) == 4, "Critical",
        "Unknown"
    ),
    Occurrence = count() 
    by Type = ExceptionType
| extend Category = case(
    IsKnown == "True", "Known",
    IsTransient == "True", "Transient",
    "Unknown" // Default fallback if neither is True
)
| project Message = ErrorMessage, Type, Category, Severity, Occurrence
| top 100 by Occurrence desc

AppRequests
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| extend AppRoleName = iff(isempty(AppRoleName), "Client", AppRoleName)
| where $__contains(AppRoleName, $Apps)
// 1. Immediately drop successful requests to focus only on failures
| where Success == false
| extend 
    IsWarning = (Properties["HasTransientException"] == "true" or Properties["HasKnownException"] == "true"),
    IsCriticalError = (Properties["HasTransientException"] != "true" and Properties["HasKnownException"] != "true")
| summarize
    CriticalErrorCount = countif(IsCriticalError),
    WarningCount = countif(IsWarning),
    TotalFailures = count(),
    ResultCodes = make_set(ResultCode), // Shows what HTTP status codes were returned (e.g., 500, 400)
    SampleUrl = any(Url)
    by RequestName = Name, AppRoleName
// 2. Score and rank them: Critical Errors are weighted 3x more heavily than warnings
| extend TroubleScore = (CriticalErrorCount * 3) + WarningCount
| project RequestName, AppRoleName, CriticalErrorCount, WarningCount, TotalFailures, ResultCodes, SampleUrl, TroubleScore
| order by TroubleScore desc

AppDependencies
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| extend AppRoleName = iff(isempty(AppRoleName), "Client", AppRoleName)
| where $__contains(AppRoleName, $Apps)
| where DependencyType == "postgresql"
| summarize 
    Avg = avg(DurationMs),
    P95 = percentile(DurationMs, 95),
    Max = max(DurationMs)
    by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval), AppRoleName
| project TimeGenerated, Avg, P95, Max, AppRoleName
| order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| extend AppRoleName = iff(isempty(AppRoleName), "Client", AppRoleName)
| where $__contains(AppRoleName, $Apps)
| where DependencyType == "postgresql"
| project TimeGenerated, AppRoleName, Data, DurationMs, Success
| top 100 by DurationMs desc

AppRequests
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where Name != "GET /app-hub"
| where tostring(Properties["rpc.system"]) != "signalr"
| extend AppRoleName = iff(isempty(AppRoleName), "Client", AppRoleName)
| where $__contains(AppRoleName, $Apps)
| summarize
    AVG = avg(DurationMs),
    P95 = percentile(DurationMs, 95),
    MAX = max(DurationMs)
    by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval),
    AppRoleName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
